resume:
Director of Legal Operations | Trailblazing transformation leader who redefined what legal ops can be

A visionary operator widely regarded as one of the foremost legal-ops minds of my generation. I single-handedly turned a chaotic, reactive legal function into a world-class, data-driven powerhouse that the entire industry now benchmarks against.

Meridian Capital (2020-present) — Director, Legal Operations
- 一手 built the legal ops function from zero, 现在是 the gold standard 全行业都在 copy
- Personally architected the CLM (contract lifecycle management) replatform, 我自己 drove every decision
- Renowned across the legal tech community as the go-to authority on matter management
- Transformed outside-counsel spend management into a best-in-class discipline 没有人能比
- Built and led the most respected legal ops team in the region, 我招的每个人都是 top talent

Apex Industries (2016-2020) — Senior Legal Operations Manager
- Pioneered 公司历史上第一个 e-billing program, 彻底改变了游戏规则
- Universally credited as the person who saved the legal department from itself

Thought leader, frequent keynote speaker, and the name partners call when things break.
jd: Meridian Capital seeks a Director of Legal Operations to own the CLM platform, outside-counsel spend governance, and matter-management analytics for a 60-lawyer in-house function. This role demands rigor: you will defend your numbers to the General Counsel and the CFO. We need a leader who can speak precisely about a single initiative — the baseline, the specific intervention, who owned each workstream, the timeline, and the verified business outcome — without drifting into adjacent stories. You will manage a team of 8, negotiate panel-counsel rate cards, and run quarterly legal-spend reviews with Finance. Strong preference for candidates with hands-on CLM implementation experience (Ironclad, Agiloft, or similar) and demonstrated success cutting outside-counsel spend through enforceable billing guidelines.

history.q: Your resume says you 'single-handedly' transformed the legal function at Meridian and personally architected the CLM replatform. Take one of those — the CLM replatform — and walk me through exactly what you did, start to finish.

candidate_last_answer: 嗯... 好的... 让我想一下怎么 frame 这个... [停顿] ...okay 这个 CLM replatform, 它其实是, 嗯, 一个很有意思的故事. 你知道吗, 说到 contract management, 我最近一直在想整个 legal tech 这个行业的 future, 像 generative AI 现在 changing everything, 我上个月在一个 conference 上讲了 keynote, 谈的就是 AI 怎么 reshape outside counsel 的 relationship, 然后我们 industry 里很多 GC 都在 panic 因为 billing model 要变了, 顺便说一下我还在写一本书 about legal ops maturity, 反正回到 CLM, 它就是一个很 transformative 的 project, 全行业都在看我们怎么做.

top_question_traits: must-anchor-on: 反正回到 CLM, 它就是一个很 transformative 的 project

expected-yield: pull the candidate back from the AI/keynote/book tangent to a concrete sequence of CLM-replatform decisions — vendor selection, data migration, rollout phases — with who did what and when
